response: Attendance is marked only by admin. You can view your attendance history in the attendance section.
You can add your daily chanting rounds from the chanting API and track your total rounds.
You can add book reading entries with date and book name.
Check trips and events for schedules, locations, and contact details.
All temple updates are posted in notifications.
Gallery has temple images and videos uploaded by admin.
You can find spiritual content links in the content section.
